overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The character traverses a covered urban plaza with digital billboards and graffiti, ascends to an elevated walkway with a water feature, and continues along a busy street with holographic advertisements and passing vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered plaza entrance with vending machines and graffiti walls

events.description: descends stairs and enters covered urban plaza from outdoor street level

agents.ego_description: walking down concrete stairs into a semi-covered plaza area, passing vending machines and graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: illuminated snack vending machine with blue and white lighting
concrete wall covered in colorful spray paint graffiti and street art
chain-link metal fence gate with vertical bars
large vertical digital poster showing a woman holding a futuristic weapon
wide concrete staircase descending into the covered plaza area

segments.scene_description: The character descends from street level into a semi-covered urban plaza entrance. Vending machines and graffiti-covered walls line the path as the camera follows from behind, transitioning from the open street into the sheltered interior space.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior covered plaza with large digital billboards and concrete pillars

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered plaza passing digital advertisements and concrete structural pillars

notable_agents.action: homeless person sitting on the ground near trash bags and personal belongings

entered.detail: large illuminated digital screen displaying an advertisement with text 'GET CHROMED?' and a figure
massive square concrete support pillar with graffiti text
painted text on concrete wall reading 'PORQUE JACKIE WELLS SE LIO CON LA PLEBE EQUIVOCADA'
pile of garbage bags and discarded items accumulated near the wall

segments.scene_description: Walking through the interior of the covered plaza, the character passes large digital billboards advertising chrome implants and concrete pillars covered in graffiti. A homeless person sits near trash bags on the left side of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza interior with neon shop signs and ascending staircase

events.description: approaches and begins ascending concrete stairs leading to upper level

agents.ego_description: walking past neon-lit shop signs and bar stools toward the exit stairs at the far end of the plaza

entered.detail: circular pink neon sign with Japanese characters indicating a ramen shop
scattered high stools and small round tables with glowing pink and blue accents
illuminated sign reading 'EL DORADO PAWN SHOP' in yellow letters
neon sign with two coffee cups and text 'Snapped Synapse Roasters'
wide concrete staircase ascending to the upper level of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the plaza interior, passing neon signs for a ramen shop and pawn shop, along with scattered bar stools. The segment ends as the character approaches and begins ascending the stairs leading upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairwell transition from covered plaza to elevated open walkway

events.description: exits covered stairwell onto open elevated plaza with city skyline views

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs from the covered plaza up to an elevated outdoor walkway

entered.detail: linear fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the stairwell ceiling
transparent glass and metal railings along the staircase edge

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the concrete stairwell, transitioning from the enclosed neon-lit plaza to an open elevated walkway. Overhead lights illuminate the climb as the city skyline becomes visible through the glass railings.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated open plaza with reflective water feature and benches

events.description: descends stairs from elevated plaza down to street level

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated plaza past a water feature and benches, then descending stairs to street level

entered.detail: rectangular reflecting pool with dark water and lily pads
teal-colored metal benches with wooden seats arranged along the walkway
small trees and shrubs in planters providing minimal greenery
long rectangular illuminated fixtures hanging overhead along the walkway

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto the open elevated plaza, the character walks past a reflective water feature and benches under warm overhead lighting. The segment concludes as the character descends another set of stairs back down to street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy multi-lane city street with holographic advertisements and vehicle traffic

events.description: futuristic vehicle passes by on the multi-lane road to the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk of a busy cyberpunk street with neon signs and passing traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving past on the wet asphalt road surface

entered.detail: tall vertical digital advertising displays showing animated content
tall poles with bright white illumination
orange and white metal railings separating sidewalk from road
wet multi-lane road surface with yellow and blue painted lines

segments.scene_description: Now at street level, the character walks along a busy multi-lane road lined with holographic billboards and neon building signs. A futuristic vehicle passes by on the wet asphalt as the character continues down the illuminated sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a city street into a sheltered urban plaza before ascending to an elevated walkway and returning to the neon-lit road. It begins by following the character from the open street down into a semi-covered entrance lined with vending machines and graffiti-covered walls. As the camera moves deeper into the plaza, the environment shifts into a dense interior of digital billboards, concrete pillars, and neon signs for ramen and pawn shops. The scene then transitions upward as the character climbs a concrete stairwell, moving from the enclosed neon glow toward an open elevated plaza featuring reflective water features and a view of the city skyline. Finally, the camera descends a second set of stairs back to street level, where the character walks along a busy multi-lane road characterized by wet asphalt, holographic advertisements, and passing futuristic vehicles.
